title: Rebate of the provincial part of the HST - Canada.ca
content:
## Rebate of the provincial part of the HST
If you pay harmonized sales tax (HST) on eligible goods that you purchase in a participating province (New Brunswick, Newfoundland and Labrador, Nova Scotia, Ontario or Prince Edward Island) but then bring into another province or other area of Canada, you may be eligible to apply for a rebate of the provincial part of the HST.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
